hero.subtitle: Connect with nearby pharmacies in real-time. Upload prescriptions, compare offers, chat with pharmacists, and get your medicines delivered — all from one bright, simple platform.

featured.title: Same-Day Prescription Delivery
featured.subtitle: Snap your prescription, we read it for you, and a nearby pharmacy delivers — fast.

features.subtitle: A complete pharmacy experience designed around you — find medicines, compare offers, and get them delivered.

geo.title: Geolocation Search
geo.description: Find pharmacies near you using GPS-powered search with configurable radius.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Live order tracking with instant status updates as your order progresses.

chat.title: In-app Chat
chat.description: Direct messaging between patients and pharmacies with typing indicators.

scan.title: Prescription Scanning
scan.description: Snap a photo of your prescription and we read the medicine names for you.

reviews.title: Reviews & Ratings
reviews.description: Rate pharmacies and read reviews to make informed decisions.

delivery.title: Delivery Tracking
delivery.description: Track your order from preparation to doorstep delivery in real-time.

secure.title: Secure Platform
secure.description: Your account and data stay protected with secure sign-in and encryption.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Push notifications for order updates, new offers, and messages.

howItWorks.title: Four Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From request to doorstep in minutes.

request.title: Request Medicine
request.description: Search for medicines by name or upload your prescription — we read it for you automatically.

offers.title: Get Offers
offers.description: Nearby pharmacies compete to serve you with their best prices and available alternatives.

chat.title: Choose & Chat
chat.description: Compare offers, chat directly with pharmacists, and confirm your preferred option.

track.title: Track & Receive
track.description: Follow your order in real-time from preparation to delivery right at your door.

cta.subtitle: Join PharmaLink today and experience the future of pharmacy services — whether you're a patient or a pharmacy owner.

about.subtitle: PharmaLink bridges the gap between patients and pharmacies, making it simple to find the medicines you need and get them delivered to your door.
about.missionBody: To make pharmaceutical services easier to access by connecting you with nearby pharmacies — with transparent pricing, instant communication, and reliable delivery, all in one place.

near.title: Pharmacies Near You
near.description: We connect you with trusted pharmacies in your area so you get what you need, faster.

available.title: Always Available
available.description: Request medicines and track your orders any time of day, right from your phone.

safe.title: Safe & Reliable
safe.description: Verified pharmacies, transparent pricing, and secure ordering you can count on.

categories.title: Browse by Category
categories.subtitle: Hundreds of medicines across all major categories, available from nearby pharmacies in real-time.

storage.title: How to store your medicines safely at home
storage.excerpt: Heat, light and humidity can reduce a medicine's potency. A few simple habits keep them effective.

scanning.title: Prescription scanning is now faster than ever
scanning.excerpt: Our improved reader extracts medicine names from a photo in seconds — fewer typos, quicker orders.

coverage.title: PharmaLink now live across all 27 governorates
coverage.excerpt: Patients everywhere can now connect with nearby pharmacies and get medicines delivered to their door.

partner.title: Partner Your Pharmacy
partner.body: Reach more patients, manage orders in real-time, and grow your pharmacy with PharmaLink.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.body: We're building the future of pharmacy access. Help us connect patients with care that's fast and reliable.
